subject: Re: warp not starting
body:
Hi Dmitry,

yes, I also have a GT720 for the display.

mike

On Sunday, November 10, 2019 at 2:50:33 PM UTC-5, Dimitry Tegunov wrote:
>
> Hi Mike,
>
> that is indeed an annoying message to get and to troubleshoot. What is the 
> exact system config? Any GPUs beside the Titan?
>
> Cheers,
> Dimitry
>
> On Thursday, November 7, 2019 at 6:06:42 PM UTC+1, Mike Strauss wrote:
>>
>> I also get this annoying message that says I don't have a compatible 
>> card, despite my nvidia applications claiming otherwise.
>>
>>
>>
>> On Wednesday, November 6, 2019 at 3:26:41 PM UTC-5, Mike Strauss wrote:
>>>
>>> I have installed warp 1.0.7 and it crashes immediately upon starting.  
>>> it gives this error:
>>>
>>> It then tells me to reinstall things, which i have done numerous times, 
>>> and it doesn't change anything.  1.0.6 will at least open the window, but 
>>> it crashes after asking to start processing anything.  I am on Win10 and 
>>> have a Titan Xp
>>>
>>> Regards,
>>> mike
>>>
>>
